title: Texan Fingers Meet Swedish Keyboard
description: Two bored Sunday warriors bond over global laziness until one has a complete mental breakdown while typing.

messages.Stranger: Yeah same here, having a quite boring sunday haha
I dont really know what though
Sundays are the worst, never a good day to try and to anything
I always end up either in bed or in the couch
oh its cold, but the snow is starting to melt now finally haha. how is it in texas?
